productDisplayName: Puma Women Essential Skinny Grey Track Pant
description: Composition Grey skinny pants made of 92% polyester and 8% elastane, with a broad,elasticated v-shaped waistband and embroidered branding on the upper left side Fitting Slim Wash care Gentle machine wash with lukewarm water Do not bleach, or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, these skinny pants from puma make a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Crafted from a polyester/elastane blend, these pants are ideal for your Sports training, jogging sessions or just laid back weekends. The U.S.P moisture management technology keeps you dry and comfortable and the sporty look does wonders for your casual style. Pair this with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes. Model statistics Model is a size M of height 5'7”; Waist: 25”; Hips: 35”
